Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.scope

Class AbstractApplicationScope

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.scope.AbstractApplicationScope
All Implemented Interfaces:
ApplicationScope, JvmScope, AutoCloseable
Direct Known Subclasses:
MainApplicationScope
public abstract class AbstractApplicationScope extends Object implements ApplicationScope
ApplicationScope for the main and test codebases.

    • getTerminal

      public Terminal getTerminal()
      Specified by:
      getTerminal in interface JvmScope
      Returns:

    • getDefaultConfiguration

      public Supplier<Configuration> getDefaultConfiguration()
      Specified by:
      getDefaultConfiguration in interface ApplicationScope
      Returns:
      the default configuration (value may change with every invocation)

      public JavaRequirements getInternalVerifier()
      Specified by:
      getInternalVerifier in interface ApplicationScope
      Returns:

    • getThreadConfiguration

      public Supplier<ThreadConfiguration> getThreadConfiguration()
      Specified by:
      getThreadConfiguration in interface ApplicationScope
      Returns:
      the configuration shared by all verifiers invoked by the current thread
